EBU R128.description: European broadcast standard (TV, radio). Target -23 LUFS ±2 dB, Phase Correlation >= 0.3

EBU R128 S1 (Streaming).description: EBU R128 for streaming (Spotify, Tidal). Target -16 LUFS, Phase Correlation >= 0.3

EBU R128 S2 (Podcast).description: EBU R128 S2 for podcast/audiobook. Target -18 LUFS, Phase Correlation >= 0.3

Podcast (Generic).description: Generic podcast target. -16 to -20 LUFS, Phase Correlation >= 0.3

AES71 (Portable Devices).description: AES71-2018 for portable devices. Target -16 LUFS, Phase Correlation >= 0.3

YouTube.description: YouTube normalizes to -14 LUFS. Phase Correlation >= 0.3 recommended

Spotify.description: Spotify Loud normalizes to -14 LUFS. Phase Correlation >= 0.3

Apple Music / iTunes.description: Apple Sound Check normalizes to -16 LUFS. Phase Correlation >= 0.3

Amazon Music.description: Amazon Music normalizes to -14 LUFS. Phase Correlation >= 0.3

Netflix.description: Netflix dialogue-anchored. Target ~ -27 LUFS dialogue, Phase Correlation >= 0.3

ATSC A/85 (USA Broadcast).description: USA/Canada broadcast standard. Target -24 LKFS ±2 dB, Phase Correlation >= 0.3

ARIB TR-B32 (Japan).description: Japanese broadcast standard. Target -24 LUFS, Phase Correlation >= 0.3

ETSI TS 102 366 (DVB).description: DVB standard for digital video broadcasting. Target -23 LUFS, Phase Correlation >= 0.3

AES77 (Cinema).description: AES77 for digital cinema. Target -24 LUFS, Phase Correlation >= 0.3

ISO/IEC 23003-4 (MPEG-H).description: MPEG-H 3D Audio loudness. Target -24 LUFS, Phase Correlation >= 0.3
